info.title: Twitter API Aggregated
info.description: Aggregated API documentation for Twitter data endpoints.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a tweet.

url.description: Web link to the tweet on X/Twitter.

text.description: Full text content of the tweet.

source.description: Name of the client application used to post the tweet.

retweetCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been retweeted.

replyCount.description: Number of replies to the tweet.

likeCount.description: Number of likes on the tweet.

quoteCount.description: Number of quote tweets referencing this tweet.

viewCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been viewed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tweet was created.

lang.description: Detected language of the tweet text, as a language code.

bookmarkCount.description: Number of times the tweet has been bookmarked.

isReply.description: Whether the tweet is a reply to another tweet.

inReplyToId.description: Identifier of the tweet this one directly replies to; present only when isReply is true.

conversationId.description: Identifier of the root tweet that started the conversation thread this tweet belongs to.

displayTextRange.description: Start and end character offsets marking the displayable portion of the tweet text.

inReplyToUserId.description: Identifier of the user being replied to.

inReplyToUsername.description: Username of the user being replied to.

author.description: Profile of the user who posted the tweet.

indices.description: Start and end character offsets of the hashtag within the tweet text.

text.description: The hashtag word, without the leading # sign.

hashtags.description: Hashtags found in the tweet text.

display_url.description: Shortened, human-readable form of the link as displayed in the tweet.

expanded_url.description: Full destination URL the displayed link resolves to.

indices.description: Start and end character offsets of the link within the tweet text.

url.description: The t.co shortened URL as it literally appears in the tweet text.

urls.description: Links found in the tweet text.

name.description: Display name of the mentioned user.

user_mentions.description: Users mentioned in the tweet text.

entities.description: Structured entities parsed from the tweet text, such as hashtags, links, and user mentions.

quoted_tweet.description:
The tweet quoted by this tweet, when it is a quote tweet.
[⚠️Note:源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。]

retweeted_tweet.description:
The original tweet this tweet retweets, when it is a retweet.
[⚠️Note:源码将该字段声明为 string 类型，但其承载的具体内容（如完整推文对象或推文 ID）未声明，待研发确认。]

isLimitedReply.description: Whether replies to this tweet are restricted by the author's reply settings.

type.description: Object type tag identifying the entry as a user.

userName.description: The user's @handle, unique across X/Twitter and used in profile URLs.

url.description: Web link to the user's profile page.

name.description: The user's display name shown on the profile.

isBlueVerified.description: Whether the user holds a paid X (Twitter) Blue verification.

verifiedType.description: The user's verification category, such as a business or government account.

profilePicture.description: Web link to the user's avatar image.

coverPicture.description: Web link to the user's profile banner image.

location.description: Free-text location the user lists on their profile.

followers.description: Number of accounts following the user.

following.description: Number of accounts the user follows.

canDm.description: Whether the user currently accepts direct messages from the requester.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user's account was created.

favouritesCount.description: Number of tweets the user has liked.

hasCustomTimelines.description: Whether the user has created custom timelines.

isTranslator.description: Whether the user participates in the Twitter translation program.

mediaCount.description: Number of media items the user has posted.

statusesCount.description: Total number of tweets the user has posted.

withheldInCountries.description: Country codes where the user's account is withheld for legal reasons.

possiblySensitive.description: Whether the user's posts are flagged as potentially sensitive.

pinnedTweetIds.description: Identifiers of tweets the user has pinned to the top of their profile.

isAutomated.description: Whether the account is labeled as an automated (bot) account.

automatedBy.description: Username of the person or entity managing the automated account.

unavailable.description: Whether the user's account is currently unavailable, for example suspended or deactivated.

message.description: Explanatory message returned when the account is unavailable.

unavailableReason.description: Reason code or text describing why the account is unavailable.

parameters.name: tweet_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tweet IDs to look up in this batch.

tweets.description: The requested tweets, one entry per matched ID.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.

get.description: Look up the full content of multiple tweets in one call by passing their tweet IDs.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tweet whose replies you want.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

replies.description: Reply tweets to the target tweet, returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.

get.description: List the replies to a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tweet whose quote tweets you want.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

tweets.description: Quote tweets referencing the target tweet, returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.

get.description: List the quote tweets that reference a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.

parameters.name: tweetId
parameters.description: Identifier of the tweet whose retweeters you want.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor from the previous response's next_cursor; leave empty to start from the first page.

users.description: Users who retweeted the target tweet, returned for this page.

has_next_page.description: Whether more pages remain; if true, call again with next_cursor to fetch them.

next_cursor.description: Cursor to pass as the cursor parameter on the next call to fetch the following page.

status.description: Outcome marker of the request, such as success or error.

message.description: Human-readable message; carries the error detail on failure.

get.description: List the users who retweeted a given tweet, paginated with the cursor.
